overall.description: A static first-person view from inside a cyberpunk apartment bedroom in Cyberpunk 2077. The scene features an unmade bed, wooden slat ceiling, and a holographic TV cycling through various advertisements and news broadcasts, with an orange-hazed cityscape visible through large blinded windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with holographic entertainment system

events.description: holographic TV switches from news broadcast to animated cartoon content featuring a pink bear character
TV content transitions to commercial advertisement block including 'All Foods' and product commercials
TV cycles back to news broadcast format with anchor figures

agents.ego_description: stationary in bed, passively watching the holographic TV as it cycles through various channels and advertisements

entered.detail: curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats creating a warm geometric pattern overhead
floor-to-ceiling windows with horizontal blinds revealing an orange-hazed cityscape outside
floating holographic display projecting various advertisements, news, and entertainment content
messy bed with rumpled white sheets and scattered items including a magazine or book
small table or surface with glowing objects and personal items

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed in a cyberpunk apartment bedroom, showing a cozy but cluttered space with a wooden slat ceiling and large windows overlooking a hazy orange cityscape. A holographic TV continuously cycles through content including news broadcasts, animated cartoons, and commercial advertisements, providing the only motion in the otherwise static scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a cyberpunk bedroom, capturing a moment of stillness against a backdrop of digital activity. It begins by establishing the cozy yet cluttered interior, where a wooden slat ceiling frames the room and large windows reveal a hazy orange cityscape. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward a holographic TV that serves as the primary source of movement in the space. The scene then evolves through the flickering light of the screen as it continuously cycles through a sequence of news broadcasts, animated cartoons, and commercial advertisements.
